The root category for all in-universe content on the Willverse Wiki — Will Wight's connected universe across four series.

; Browse by kind
* [[:Category:Characters|Characters]]
* [[:Category:Locations|Locations]]
* [[:Category:Groups|Groups]]
* [[:Category:Events|Events]]
* [[:Category:Magic|Magic]]
* [[:Category:Lifeforms|Lifeforms]]
* [[:Category:Culture|Culture]]
* [[:Category:Objects and Materials|Objects and Materials]]
* [[:Category:Concepts|Concepts]]

; Browse by series
* [[:Category:Traveler's Gate|Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Elder Empire|Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Cradle|Cradle]]
* [[:Category:The Last Horizon|The Last Horizon]]

; Wiki structure
* [[:Category:Books|The novels]]
* [[:Category:Timelines|Per-entity timelines]]
* [[:Category:Amalgam|Cross-series pages]]
* [[:Category:Meta|Wiki maintenance]]
